learnings: `cljfmt.main` uses the `check` subcommand form (`clojure -M:fmt check ...`) rather than a `--check` flag.
Project-local `.gitignore` should exclude generated Clojure caches like `.cpcache/` and `.clj-kondo/.cache/`.
result_payload.summary: Set up a minimal Clojure CLI project with `deps.edn`, placeholder app/test, clj-kondo + cljfmt quality gates, and durable `make run` / `make check` entrypoints. Verified `make run`, `clojure -M:run`, `make check`, and the validator all pass.
